jobs.title: Senior Data Engineer
match_reasons: Extensive production experience in core data engineering technologies like PySpark, Apache Spark, Azure Databricks, Delta Lake, Airflow, and Terraform (IaC).
Proven experience with cloud platforms (Azure, Databricks, Snowflake, AWS) directly relevant to large-scale data infrastructure.
Demonstrated ability in data governance, stakeholder management, and building robust data pipelines, aligning with senior engineering responsibilities.
gaps: Limited depth in Kafka/Confluent and Kubernetes/Helm, which are often key for large-scale, real-time data platforms.
Limited production depth in dbt, although the core analytics engineering skills are present.
jobs.one_liner: Sri Hari Sivashanmugam is a strong candidate for a Senior Data Engineer role, possessing extensive production experience in cloud data engineering, IaC, and data governance, with eligibility for EU Blue Card.

jobs.title: Data Analyst - CoreOps
match_reasons: Strong experience in designing and maintaining operational KPIs and dashboards (Tableau, Power BI, Streamlit mentioned in skills).
Experience with data-driven insights and partnering with Product, Engineering, and Support teams.
Skills in dimensional modeling and data quality validation align with the need for operational reliability and process improvement.
Experience with stakeholder management up to Director level is beneficial for partnering with various teams.
Core skills in SQL and Python are highly relevant for data analysis and operational routines.
gaps: The role focuses heavily on operational dashboards and KPI design, while the candidate's experience seems more production/engineering focused. Direct experience in designing operational KPIs from scratch for a product ecosystem might be limited.
Specific experience in designing and enforcing SLOs/SLAs, exception handling routines, and reconciliations at this operational level is not explicitly detailed.
The role is in Santiago, Chile, and the candidate's target countries and visa eligibility are not a match.
jobs.one_liner: Sri Hari is a strong candidate for data analysis and operational excellence roles with extensive data engineering and analytics skills, though direct alignment with the specific operational focus and location of this role needs careful consideration.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
match_reasons: Strong SQL skills and experience with cloud data warehouses like Snowflake.
Experience building and maintaining dashboards in Tableau.
Ability to translate business questions into analytical frameworks and communicate findings.
Experience with data modeling (dimensional modeling, Data Vault) which aligns with the collaboration with the Senior Analytics Engineer.
gaps: The candidate's dbt experience is noted as limited production depth, which is a core tool mentioned for the Analytics Engineer collaboration.
While the role is Data Analyst, the candidate's primary experience leans towards engineering and more advanced data science/ML roles, making this a slight down-level.
jobs.one_liner: Sri Hari is a good fit for this Data Analyst role due to strong SQL, Snowflake, and Tableau skills, but may be overqualified or have limited depth in specific areas of the collaboration.

jobs.title: Data Analytics Engineer
match_reasons: Strong alignment with Analytics Engineer title and responsibilities.
Proficient in SQL, Snowflake, and Tableau, which are key requirements.
Experience with data modeling and building datasets is a strong match.
Good stakeholder management skills are highlighted.
Familiarity with AI-assisted tools aligns with the description.
gaps: Limited production depth in dbt, which is a core requirement for building and maintaining dbt models.
The job explicitly states 'No visa sponsorship available', and the candidate is currently on H-1B and requires visa sponsorship or relocation support, making them ineligible for this role.
While the candidate has working knowledge of Kafka, the job description doesn't explicitly mention it, but deep Kafka experience is listed as a gap for the candidate.
The candidate's target countries do not include the United States.
jobs.one_liner: While Sri Hari has strong analytical and data engineering skills, the lack of visa sponsorship and the US location make this role a poor fit despite alignment with the Analytics Engineer responsibilities.

jobs.title: Mid Data Analyst - Finance
match_reasons: Candidate has strong experience in data modeling and building reports/dashboards, aligning with the core responsibilities of the role.
Candidate possesses advanced Python and SQL skills, which are foundational for data analysis and modeling.
Candidate has experience with dimensional modeling (Kimball) and dbt, directly matching the technology mentioned in the job description.
Candidate's target roles include Analytics Engineer, making this position conceptually aligned with career aspirations.
gaps: The job explicitly mentions 'dbt (limited prod depth)' as a gap for the candidate, which is a core requirement for this role.
The candidate's core strengths lie in Data Engineering and ML Engineering, with less emphasis on pure Data Analytics in a finance context.
The candidate's experience is primarily in Data Science and Engineering, not specifically focused on financial analytics or FP&A support.
jobs.one_liner: While Sri Hari has strong data modeling and technical skills, their depth in dbt and specific experience in financial analytics are potential gaps for this Mid Data Analyst role.
